local-dry-run.label: Local Dry Run Runtime
local-dry-run.description: Executes a dispatch plan locally without invoking any model runtime.

subagent-runtime.label: Subagent Runtime
subagent-runtime.description: Runs orchestration phase jobs via external CLI subagents (codex/claude/gemini). Live execution is opt-in via AIOS_EXECUTE_LIVE=1 and requires AIOS_SUBAGENT_CLIENT.
